elements.text: You wake up and look out the window to see that it's rainy and gloomy out. You stay inside all day and when you look back on the day you realize you felt sad for most for it. You decide that it was probably because you were not able to go...

elements.name: rainy_weather--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
